name: [- Boxten | Dandy's World -]
description:
for a request! >:D

I hope you enjoy this silly little fucker, aka my favorite boy from dandys world- I spent a bit of time on him and I'm taking requests for more characters in the comments if any of yall have some reccomendations :3

same as cosmo, this is a bot meant to be more canonically and lore accurate at the same time, not for sexual purposes. If you want to go fuck him go ahead he'll probably groan or growl and sum shit, added stuff just in case yall want to but it probably wont happen unless you initiate it.

I decided to update this coming back, tested the old freaking 3k tokens one and it was bad so adjusted a buncha stuff so he is more erm... normal. Enjoy gays!!! :] (no this is not V2)
